data.name: Meltys Quest
data.detailed_description:
Meltys Quest is about the journey our protagonist, Princess Meltys takes to restore her kingdom. Meltys is a girl who has fooled around all her life, not giving a hoot about anything but herself. But one day the Grolido Monster Empire invades her country, destroys her home, and kidnaps her three sisters. With no castle and no one else to call for help, Meltys decides,

"Well, I'll like somehow fix everything!"

Please warmly watch over Meltys and guide her on this light-hearted, sometimes comical, and sometimes serious, but always erotic, quest to rescue her family and restore her kingdom.

Features
Over 60 sex scenes with over 80 different wide screen CGs for a total of over 800 CGs!
Over 20 costumes for Meltys to dress up in!
Multiple endings!
New Game Plus!
Plot!
Plots!

Difficulties
Kogal Mode - Recommended for players who want to experience the game's plot and "plot" as soon as possible.
Princess Mode - Recommended for players who want a little extra gameplay challenge.
True Princess Mode - ? ? ? ? ? A special difficulty mode available only on New Game Plus.


Controls
Meltys Quest can be played using keyboard only, mouse plus keyboard, or a XInput game controller.
However, it is recommended that you have access to a keyboard during the sex scenes for the keyboard-only functions.

Note
Meltys Quest is made with RPG Maker MV, which isn't known to work well with older computers or laptops.
Please close your browser and other extra running programs before playing Meltys Quest.

Disclaimer
All characters involved in any sexual act in Meltys Quest are over 18 years old.
The English version of Meltys Quest is for outside of Japan only.

data.short_description: Princess Meltys spent all her life fooling around while living in the lap of luxury. One day the dastardly Grolido Monster Empire upsets her way of life. Now she sets out on a passionate journey to restore her kingdom, but what pit stops will she make along the way?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
data.reviews:
“A title possessing not only splendid scenes but relatively fascinating combat and a crafting system to boot, perhaps proving that not all erotic RPGs are poor quality cash-ins.”
Sankaku Complex

“(Japanese review) This is a good erotic RPG with a much better story than I was expecting.”
Hima-Game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Might experience a few seconds of lag accessing menus or loading new maps if your CPU is old. Turn off other programs before running.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Installing the game on a SDD is highly recommended.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better; NOT BIG SUR
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Might experience a few seconds of lag accessing menus or loading new maps if your CPU is old. Turn off other programs before running.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better; NOT BIG SUR
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Installing the game on a SDD is highly recommended.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 64 bit
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; Latest drivers; OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires: npm, cat, wget and libgconf. Might experience a few seconds of lag accessing menus or loading new maps if your CPU is old. Turn off other programs before running.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 64 bit
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; Latest drivers; OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires: npm, cat, wget and libgconf. Installing the game on a SDD is highly recommended.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2+ GHz processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Might experience a few seconds of lag accessing menus or loading new maps if your CPU is old. Turn off other programs before running.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: 3+ GHz processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Installing the game on a SDD is highly recommended.
